economic_notes: One-seventh ownership in Brokenhead River Casino Resort Limited Partnership (equity method); share of earnings $1,373,700 in 2022. Also holds investment in 10123199 Manitoba Ltd. South Beach Casino Limited Partnership accounted for by modified equity method.
notes: Fiscal year ended March 31, 2022. Consolidated entity includes Band Administration, Bulk Fuels, Health Authority, and Miishipaawiitik Inc. Two GBEs accounted for by modified equity method: South Beach Casino Limited Partnership and 10123199 Manitoba Ltd. Large construction in progress of $32.9M primarily related to school project ($30M). Significant deferred revenue of $8.1M mainly for school project. Province of Manitoba has claimed $302,989 against the First Nation; First Nation counter-claimed $1,856,547. Net assets (debt) position is positive at $397,996 at year end compared to net debt of $772,613 prior year. No schedule of remuneration included in the document. Revenue line for Southeast College distributions ($500,000) and Assembly of Manitoba Chiefs ($747,392) appear in budget but AMC does not appear in actuals; Southeast College appears in actuals. South Beach Casino income ($1,373,700) is included in band generated revenue or other revenue lines within the segmented disclosure.
